chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-2624 of 2017 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(s) For hearing of M.A No.10014/17. For hearing of main case. 01-04-2019. Mr. Muhammad Arshad S. Pathan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Jangu Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. Mr. Aslam Pervaiz Khan, Asst: Attorney General. = Mr. Imtiaz Ali Channa, Advocate while holding brief for Mr. Babar Ali Kazmi, counsel for respondents No.1 to 5, intimates that latter is unwell. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner is aggrieved by a call-up notice issued to him by NAB for allegedly committing a default in payment of electricity bill. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB undertakes that no action in terms of call-up notice will be taken by NAB against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and does not press this petition but submits that for redressal of his grievance with regard to amount of electricity bill, he will move an application before Electric Inspector. In the light of above, this petition is disposed of as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE *Fahad Memon*
